content:
Executive summary (for PM)

  • Run tier: B (timeboxed)—theme-based Salomon/DA/XO where noted; not full multi-query Salomon depth per key. Fresh Jira text pulled 2026-05-15 for every in-scope story.
  • Skipped doc-writer stories: HRREC-90852 (AG:) and HRREC-90853 (RN:) per gap-review scope rules.
  • Template and mail lane risk: internal precedent ties blank or rejected sends to Recruiting Communications / message template health and Email Analytics subject rules—centralise one tenant checklist for QE.
  • Unread and notifications: align who sees what when another recruiter reads a thread before bell and My Conversations work lands (HRREC-91997–91999 with 91975).
  • Purge and lifecycle: use one shared definition of closed, post-purge empty state, and lifecycle admin defaults across 92011–92014 and 92012.
  • Agency vs candidate tabs: single isolation predicate for 91991, 92007, 92008, 92029—security review once, then mirror in Jira.

Epic-level notes

  • Salomon themes queried this run: (1) Recruiting Communications / tenant templates: blank-body risk when subject or body missing or template overrides recruiter draft (internal precedent on grid sends). (2) Purge: Recruiting Communications PDT removes conversation messages, participants, recruiting email attachments, notification events—align recruiter-visible UI after purge with privacy comms. (3) Agency / UDMF: duplicate agency submissions depend on BP CRF vs UDMF-aware rule; isolation tests need explicit internal vs agency accounts.
  • XO themes queried: XO MCP — searched cl: Conversation (and related conversational UI classes) as anchor for thread container work. … XO MCP — searched Recruiting Email PRU/PU paths (Candidate Email create, External/Internal candidate parms) for send/receive wiring.
  • Deployment Agent (batched): Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications overrides, Recruiting Communications template risk, defect logging for SMTP mode; agency isolation template fields (UDMF depth not fully returned—treat as SUV follow-up).
  • Compose / send / validation slices share one happy path recipe—avoid conflicting manual mocks across 91987–91996 and 91994/92036.
  • HRREC-92013 remains exploratory until report IDs are named; do not block UI stories on it without inventory.
  • HRREC-92022 needs OE conversation with Blythe Early before engineering estimate—keep out of sprint commit until AC exists.

Repo artefacts: keys CSV docs/initiatives/two-way-email/drafts/gap_82977_story_keys.csv; generator docs/initiatives/two-way-email/drafts/emit_gap_review_82977_tier_b_confluence.py. Optional dedup: python3 docs/initiatives/two-way-email/drafts/check_gap_review_row_dedup.py <this file>

StoryGap score (%)PM lensQA lensXO lensVerdictSuggested missing BDD (Given/When/Then)

HRREC-91946
[Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SSP (XO Only)

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — [Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SSP (XO Only): confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Agency / UDMF: duplicate agency submissions depend on BP CRF vs UDMF-aware rule; isolation tests need explicit internal vs agency accounts.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91946 ([Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SS…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Exercise negatives implied by [Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SSP (XO Only): record tenant SKU (SSP growth) and mail lane used.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91946 ([Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SS…): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-91946: [Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SSP (XO Only) — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched Recruiting Email PRU/PU paths (Candidate Email create, External/Internal candidate parms) for send/receive wiring.
  • XO MCP — risk: validate which XO class owns the recruiter-visible field you are changing—avoid fixing the wrong layer.
  • Finding: HRREC-91946 — Slice looks UI-led in Jira; backend touchpoints (notifications, persistence) need one SUV confirmation pass.
  • Recommended next step: Document tenant limits (attachment size, recipient count) beside UI acceptance text.

Scenario: REST parity spot-check (key-specific)
Given tenant staged for HRREC-91946 with logged mail mode
When the recruiter performs the behaviour described in: [Initialisation] Recruiter can see Email Task on SSP (XO Only)
Then UI, persisted thread state, and captured network payloads align for this slice

HRREC-91948
[Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion

38% — PM slice value clear; QA tenant limits; XO catalog present but per-hook proof still SUV work.

  • Jira — [Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Purge: Recruiting Communications PDT removes conversation messages, participants, recruiting email attachments, notification events—align recruiter-visible UI after purge with privacy comms.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91948 ([Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Exercise negatives implied by [Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion: record tenant SKU (SSP growth) and mail lane used.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91948 ([Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-91948: [Initialisation] Enabled SSP Growth/Expansion — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched cl: Conversation Message (+ Derived, Status, Sender) for delivery tags, read/unread, purge visibility.
  • XO MCP — risk: attachment handling spans multiple services—confirm which layer enforces limits for this flow.
  • Finding: HRREC-91948 — Accessibility and empty states are easy to regress—pair visual checks with keyboard-only navigation notes.
  • Recommended next step: Run one cross-browser smoke on the primary path after each merge train batch for this epic.

HRREC-91975
PH: Recruiter receives a notification

42% — PM routing expectations vs QA device-matrix vs XO notification-type depth (Tier B theme pass).

  • Jira — PH: Recruiter receives a notification: confirm acceptance scenarios still match recruiter language after recent edits.
  • Salomon — Purge: Recruiting Communications PDT removes conversation messages, participants, recruiting email attachments, notification events—align recruiter-visible UI after purge with privacy comms.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91975 (PH: Recruiter receives a notification): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • Functional knowledge — Consent and audit expectations for candidate-visible email still apply—tie any new surface to comms policy review.
  • Jira — Bell vs My Conversations vs optional device email: assert payload fields and no duplicate drop across channels.
  • Salomon — Email Analytics may reject empty subject lines—pair blank-body template issues with vendor status rows when reproducing.
  • Deployment Agent — For HRREC-91975 (PH: Recruiter receives a notification): log whether notifications use Default SMTP vs any override in Edit Tenant Setup - Notifications; capture Recruiting Communications template active state when reproducing mail defects.
  • XO MCP — row focus HRREC-91975: PH: Recruiter receives a notification — map SUV bindings for this slice; Tier B catalog search only (no per-hook proof in this pass).
  • XO MCP — searched cl: Conversation Message (+ Derived, Status, Sender) for delivery tags, read/unread, purge visibility.
  • XO MCP — risk: duplicate REST paths for similar compose actions—assert the exact endpoint used by this UI path.
  • Finding: HRREC-91975 — Cross-story overlap on compose/send paths—risk of conflicting mocks unless QE shares one baseline tenant recipe.
  • Recommended next step: Document tenant limits (attachment size, recipient count) beside UI acceptance text.
